headline: RBC Capital Raises its Price Target on Jacobs (J) to $169
summary: Jacobs Solutions Inc. (NYSE:J) is one of the 10 Best Construction Stocks for Data Center Infrastructure. On May 6, 2026, RBC Capital analyst Sabahat Khan raised the firm’s price target on Jacobs Solutions Inc. (NYSE:J) to $169 from $160 and maintained an Outperform rating on the shares. The firm said Jacobs delivered Q2 results ahead […]
